description: OpenAI SDK consumer — OpenAI Chat Completions shape. Exercises the non-Anthropic emission shape; cache_origin='client' since the proxy's OpenAI path does not manage provider-side cache today.

provider_stub_response.note: LoopbackProvider returns an Anthropic-shaped body for every route class today — SC-03 scope. OpenAI-shaped canned responses would be an SC+1 addition if real SDK-parser coverage is needed.
